# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Editorial fix
- [ ] Problem statement clarification
- [ ] Prior art addition
- [ ] Security consideration
- [ ] Design rationale
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Repository maintenance
- [ ] Other

## Affected documents

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] RFC-0000
- [ ] RFC-0001
- [ ] RFC-0002
- [ ] Manifesto
- [ ] Translations
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Schema
- [ ] Other

## Does this change project scope?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes

If yes, explain.

## Does this propose a technical solution?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes

If yes, explain why this belongs here instead of a design issue first.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change uses neutral language.
- [ ] Existing standards are described fairly.
- [ ] Problem statements are separated from solutions.
- [ ] The change does not define endpoint names, schemas, or media types without an open design issue.
- [ ] Markdown formatting is clean.
